hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, re, os
file = os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH', '')
if not file:
    sys.exit(0)
try:
    with open(file, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:
        content = f.read()
except:
    sys.exit(0)
patterns = [
    r'(?i)(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,})',
    r'(?i)(AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16})',
    r'(?i)(ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36})',
    r'(?i)(xoxb-[0-9]+-[0-9a-zA-Z]+)',
    r'(?i)password\s*=\s*[\x27\x22][^\x27\x22]{8,}[\x27\x22]',
    r'(?i)api[_-]?key\s*=\s*[\x27\x22][^\x27\x22]{16,}[\x27\x22]',
    r'(?i)secret\s*=\s*[\x27\x22][^\x27\x22]{16,}[\x27\x22]'
]
for pattern in patterns:
    if re.search(pattern, content):
        print(f'WARNING: Possible secret detected in {file}. Review before saving.', file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(0)
" 2>&1 || true

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs)$'; then if [ -f ".prettierrc" ] || [ -f ".prettierrc.json" ] || [ -f "prettier.config.js" ] || [ -f "prettier.config.ts" ]; then npx --yes prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then if command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1; then black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then if [ -f "tsconfig.json" ] && command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi; fi
